mapper.select: SELECT sr.role_name FROM sys_role sr INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = sr.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id FROM sys_role sr INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = sr.id WHERE sr.role_name = 'admin' AND ur.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT u.user_id FROM user_role u INNER JOIN sys_role r ON u.role_id = r.id WHERE r.role_name='superAdmin' )
